core.label: SPARQL Fundamentals
core.description: Query RDF knowledge graphs and linked data.

topics.label: RDF & Triple Stores
topics.description: Subject-Predicate-Object triples. SPARQL queries RDF data like SQL queries tables.

topics.label: SELECT Queries
topics.description: SELECT ?var WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } — match triple patterns and return bindings.

topics.label: Triple Patterns
topics.description: Match nodes and edges in the graph. Variables start with ?.

topics.label: FILTER & Functions
topics.description: Filter results with regex, comparisons, and built-in functions.

topics.label: OPTIONAL & UNION
topics.description: OPTIONAL for left-join semantics, UNION for combining patterns.

topics.label: Aggregation
topics.description: GROUP BY, COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, HAVING. Summarize graph data.

topics.label: CONSTRUCT & DESCRIBE
topics.description: Build new RDF graphs from query results. Transform linked data.

topics.label: Wikidata & DBpedia
topics.description: Query real knowledge graphs. Wikidata SPARQL endpoint is freely accessible.
